context: Tests whether the response correctly identifies the JWT exp vs Date.now() unit mismatch bug and provides the correct fix.

checklist.name: Identifies seconds vs milliseconds mismatch
checklist.description: Explains that JWT exp is in seconds (Unix timestamp) while Date.now() returns milliseconds

checklist.name: Provides correct fix
checklist.description: Shows the fix: either divide Date.now() by 1000 or multiply exp by 1000 before comparing

checklist.name: Correct comparison direction
checklist.description: The fix checks that current time is less than exp (token not yet expired), not the reverse

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about JWT, Unix timestamps, or JavaScript Date APIs
